subject: Implementation: Interactive event handlers (events.go)
description:
Implement event handlers for interactive prompts in TUI event loop.

Dependencies: Task 9 complete (parsers ready)

Files: internal/tui/claude/events.go

Implementation:
1. Expand case "user" to distinguish event types
2. Add handlers for each interactive type
3. Update panel state to track awaiting responses
4. Display prompts using output.go rendering

Code pattern:
```go
case "user":
    if askEvent, err := event.AsAskUserQuestion(); err == nil {
        m.handleAskUserQuestion(askEvent)
    } else if planEvent, err := event.AsPlanApproval(); err == nil {
        m.handlePlanApproval(planEvent)
    } else if toolDenial, err := event.AsToolDenial(); err == nil {
        m.handleToolDenial(toolDenial)
    }
```

Deliverable:
- Event handlers for all interactive types
- State updates for awaiting responses
- Integration with output rendering

Acceptance:
- [ ] All interactive event types handled
- [ ] Panel state updated correctly
- [ ] Prompts displayed to user
- [ ] No regressions in existing event handling
